company_name: Arcaea (formerly Bloomsbury Genetic Therapies beauty division)
product_highlights: Proprietary actives developed with leading beauty brands
Ingredients with unprecedented performance from genetic engineering
notes: Arcaea is a pioneering synthetic biology company focused on creating next-generation beauty ingredients through precision fermentation and genetic engineering. Their technology platform enables the production of entirely new bioactive molecules with unprecedented performance characteristics. Arcaea represents the cutting edge of the biotech beauty ingredient revolution, working with leading beauty brands to develop proprietary actives.
